description: Representative input/AST pairs for the Jeffs Brain query parser. Extracted from packages/memory/src/query/parser.test.ts. Every SDK parser must emit an AST structurally equivalent to `expectedAst` for the given `input`. `raw` is the normalised form of `input` after NFC + whitespace collapse.

cases.name: lowercases bare terms and drops stop words
preserves quoted phrases exactly including stop words
honours explicit AND/OR/NOT operators without filtering stop words
cases.input: foo AND the OR bar NOT baz

expectedAst.raw: foo AND the OR bar NOT baz

cases.name: NFC normalises composed vs decomposed characters
bare stop-word-only query collapses to empty tokens
drops lowercase boolean words from bare natural-language queries
cases.input: not cocktail and snacks or dessert

expectedAst.raw: not cocktail and snacks or dessert

cases.name: drops recommendation filler words from long natural-language queries
cases.input: I've been thinking about making a cocktail for an upcoming get-together, but I'm not sure which one to choose. Any suggestions?

expectedAst.raw: I've been thinking about making a cocktail for an upcoming get-together, but I'm not sure which one to choose. Any suggestions?

cases.name: strips generic question scaffolding (pick up / return)
cases.input: How many items of clothing do I need to pick up or return from a store?

expectedAst.raw: How many items of clothing do I need to pick up or return from a store?

cases.name: strips generic question scaffolding (movie recommendation)
cases.input: Can you recommend a show or movie for me to watch tonight?

expectedAst.raw: Can you recommend a show or movie for me to watch tonight?

cases.name: strips generic question scaffolding (battery tips)
cases.input: I have been having trouble with the battery life on my phone lately. Any tips?

expectedAst.raw: I have been having trouble with the battery life on my phone lately. Any tips?

cases.name: first-person doctor question
cases.input: What types of doctors have I seen?

expectedAst.raw: What types of doctors have I seen?

compileToFTS.name: rewrites NOT into AND NOT after the first token
compileToFTS.expectedFTS: foo AND bar AND NOT baz

compileToFTS.name: drops a leading NOT because FTS5 cannot start with NOT
wraps phrases and preserves prefix wildcards
